prompt: Evaluate the described field condition and return the appropriate decision with supporting observations.
scenario: Photos of E-201 EMT bending & installation show several completed pieces, but the area count and remaining scope are not listed. The submitted package does not include the quantity takeoff needed to score the checkpoint. Source anchors for review: NEC Art. 358, Ch. 9 (fill).
title: T2 E-201 Insufficient evidence Progress assessment
